metadata.description: NF discriminant vs EC conductor bridge test

interpretation.prime_factors: TRIVIAL: NF discs and EC conductors have different prime factor distributions. Large z reflects genuine distributional difference, not a bridge.
interpretation.class_number_rank: REAL BUT TINY: r=0.0162 survives deconfounding (z=11.8). Driven by degree-2 fields. Effect size too small to be useful.
interpretation.direct_match: DEAD: exact match rate equals bootstrap null. No special affinity.
interpretation.radical: Jaccard z=1.31. Exact matches: 3423, ramp==bad_prime in 3423 of those.
